use_cases: Selecting date ranges for booking flights or hotels
Scheduling appointments or events across two months
Filtering data by date ranges in analytics dashboards
Setting date-bound subscriptions or recurring payments
Planning travel itineraries with start and end dates
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui-based dual calendar component that displays two adjacent months side-by-side, allowing users to select a date range. Features a clean, accessible interface with keyboard navigation support, commonly used for booking flows, scheduling interfaces, and date-based filtering in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
